{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Monarch weapon
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The spear is not quite a [[Monarch weapon]] but could be used by one.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“I don’t know that you could quite call it a Monarch weapon,” Eithan said, “but a Monarch wouldn’t be ashamed to use it.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
